DreggNet

The live network of sovereign cells. Every card you open verifies the cell’s committed history in your own browser with a recursive-STARK light client — don’t trust the server, verify it.

connecting to the edge node…
Drive the network › connect & act
cell graph — the custodial hub and its cells
cells on the network
loading cells…
the live cells + per-cell trustless verify. Drive the network to connect an identity and fire real cap-gated turns — publish a minisite, open a lease, transfer.
